description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a symmetrical facade. The exterior is finished in a smooth gray material, featuring large rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front of the house is accentuated by two rectangular pools with central fountains, set on a tiled patio. The interior layout is open and spacious, with visible living, dining, and bedroom areas, as well as modern furnishings and decor. The house includes multiple entry points, with the main entrance marked by a double door and a prominent arched window above. The landscaping is minimal, focusing on clean lines and geometric forms.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a symmetrical gray facade, featuring twin front pools and a spacious, open-plan interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and two rectangular pools with fountains on a tiled patio.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid gray wall with minimal windows and a partial view of the interior layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows across the back, revealing bedroom and living spaces inside.
description_view_3: Right side view showing additional windows, a secondary entrance, and the continuation of the front pools.
attribute_entryway_design: Double door entry with an arched window above, flanked by large windows and accessed via a tiled patio with twin pools.
